title: Crunchy Keto Cheese Bites
description: A simple, crunchy snack made with cheese and crunchy ingredients, perfect for keto dieters.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together cheese and crushed crunchy ingredients.
Add malths to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Spoon the mixture onto a baking sheet and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
Allow to cool completely before serving.
